reference: PROAS IN THAT QUARTER WERE USUALLY DISTRUSTED BY SHIPS IT IS TRUE BUT THE SEA IS FULL OF THEM AND FAR MORE ARE INNOCENT THAN ARE GUILTY OF ANY ACTS OF VIOLENCE
text: Per ounce in that quarter were usually distrusted by the ships. It is true, but the sea is full of them, and far more are innocent than are guilty of any act of violence.
